source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An air flow of 5 kg/min at 1500 K, 125 kPa goes through a constant-pressure heat exchanger, giving energy to a heat engine. The air exits at 500 K, and the ambient is at 298 K, 100 kPa. Find the power the engine can produce.
